8aae9195-ea51-4a66-908e-441503a8efcb.desc: Step softly and lift the knee and hand together on the same side.
how: Prepare
Stand tall with your feet together and your knees slightly bent. Soften your face and breathe smoothly.
Lift
Shift your weight onto your right foot. At the same time, lift your left knee up high and raise your left hand up beside your head.
Step
Lower your left foot to take a small step forward, your left hand sinking down as the foot touches the ground.
Shift
Move your weight onto your left foot, then lift your right knee high and your right hand up in the same way.
Repeat
Continue stepping softly — the arm and leg on the same side rising together — for the time given.

8aae9195-ea51-4a66-908e-441503a8efcb.desc: Place the heel gently and roll through the foot.
how: Prepare
Stand tall, arms relaxed, weight settled evenly.
Step
Step one foot forward and place it down heel-first, toes lifted.
Roll
Slowly roll your weight through the foot — heel, ball, then toes — as the whole sole meets the floor.
Shift
Transfer your weight fully onto the front foot, keeping your head lifted and spine tall.
Repeat
Bring the back foot through and continue, walking slowly with short, measured steps.

8aae9195-ea51-4a66-908e-441503a8efcb.desc: Lift your hands lightly in front and wave side to side as you step.
how: Prepare
Stand with soft knees. Raise one hand to chest height, palm toward you, and let the other sink low, palm up — as if softly holding a large ball.
Turn
Turn gently from the waist to one side, letting your hands trace slow circles past each other, like guiding clouds. Let the waist lead the arms.
Step
As you turn, take a soft step to the side, then bring the trailing foot in to meet it.
Breathe
Inhale as you turn one way, exhale as you turn back. Keep your hands no higher than eye level.
Repeat
Flow slowly from side to side, the waist always leading, for the time given.

8aae9195-ea51-4a66-908e-441503a8efcb.desc: Stand evenly on both feet and relax the arms.
how: Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even on both feet.
Settle
Let your knees soften and your shoulders drop. Relax your arms and unclench your jaw.
Breathe
Take a few slow, easy breaths, feeling steady and rooted through both feet.
Rest
Simply stand and be still, letting the movement settle before the next round.

1c889661-cb3e-4607-9950-a02d06d8a3a0.dose: 6 each side × 3 rounds · Repeat both sides
1c889661-cb3e-4607-9950-a02d06d8a3a0.desc: Cup your hands in front and lift the knee up to meet them.
how: Prepare
Stand tall and hold both hands out in front of you at about waist height, palms up and softly cupped.
Rotate
Lift one knee and let the hip turn gently, bringing the leg up in front of you.
Touch
Guide the knee or foot up toward your cupped hands, tapping lightly if you can reach — never straining for it.
Lower
Lower the leg with control, then repeat on the other side.
Keep it easy
Keep the movement low and slow. Height doesn't matter here — control does.

1c889661-cb3e-4607-9950-a02d06d8a3a0.desc: Step one foot to the side and bring the other in smoothly.
how: Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even.
Step
Step one foot out to the side, letting your weight glide smoothly across.
Close
Bring the other foot in quietly to meet it, feet together.
Repeat
Continue gliding to the side with small, quiet steps.
Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even on both feet.
Settle
Let your knees soften and your shoulders drop. Relax your arms and unclench your jaw.
Breathe
Take a few slow, easy breaths, feeling steady and rooted through both feet.
Rest
Simply stand and be still, letting the movement settle before the next round.

58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.dose: 8 each side × 3 rounds · Repeat both sides
58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.desc: Sweep one hand past the knee and step forward softly.
how: Prepare
Settle your weight back and soften your hips.
Brush
As your weight begins to move forward, sweep your front hand down and gently past your knee, palm turning inward — a soft clearing, not a forceful sweep.
Push
Bring the other hand forward from near your waist, extending to about chest height, palm facing forward. Keep the elbow unlocked.
Shift
Pour your weight slowly onto the front foot, staying tall — don't lean into the push. Let the waist lead.
Repeat
Step through and repeat on the other side.

58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.desc: Step forward small and press both palms without locking the elbows.
how: Prepare
Take a small step forward, drawing both palms back near your chest.
Press
Slowly press both palms forward — as if moving gently through water — as your weight shifts onto the front foot.
Soften
Keep your elbows unlocked and your shoulders relaxed; move from the waist, not the arms.
Repeat
Step forward with small, even steps, pressing softly each time.

58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.dose: 6 each side × 3 rounds · Repeat both sides
58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.desc: Circle the arms gently and shift your weight with the circle.
how: Prepare
Stand with soft knees, arms lightly forward.
Circle
Begin a slow, continuous circle with your arms, turning gently at the waist. Keep your wrists soft and the motion smooth.
Connect
Let your weight shift with the circle, your feet following the flow — hand, waist and foot moving as one.
Repeat
Keep circling slowly, one direction then the other, never breaking the flow.

58d393bd-f0c8-42c8-9d5b-d4273f35b167.desc: Stand evenly on both feet and relax the arms.
how: Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even on both feet.
Settle
Let your knees soften and your shoulders drop. Relax your arms and unclench your jaw.
Breathe
Take a few slow, easy breaths, feeling steady and rooted through both feet.
Rest
Simply stand and be still, letting the movement settle before the next round.

70905929-e46d-4860-8151-3a39fb04d6b4.desc: Walk with short strides and keep your head lifted.
how: Prepare
Stand tall, head lifted, gaze forward.
Step
Walk forward with short, unhurried strides, placing each foot softly.
Flow
Let your arms swing naturally and breathe smoothly as you go.
Repeat
Keep the pace slow and even for the time given.

70905929-e46d-4860-8151-3a39fb04d6b4.desc: Lift your hands softly and wave side to side.
how: Prepare
Stand tall, arms relaxed, shoulders soft.
Lift
Raise both hands lightly to about chest height.
Wave
Gently wave your hands and shoulders from side to side, turning a little at the waist, keeping the movement loose and easy.
Repeat
Flow side to side, letting your shoulders roll softly with each wave.

70905929-e46d-4860-8151-3a39fb04d6b4.desc: Stand evenly and relax the jaw.
how: Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even on both feet.
Settle
Let your knees soften and your shoulders drop. Relax your arms and unclench your jaw.
Breathe
Take a few slow, easy breaths, feeling steady and rooted through both feet.
Rest
Simply stand and be still, letting the movement settle before the next round.

3b3dc87b-7fcb-4ace-9695-0eb4243733ec.desc: Step forward small and press both palms without locking the elbows.
how: Prepare
Take a small step forward, drawing both palms back near your chest.
Press
Slowly press both palms forward — as if moving gently through water — as your weight shifts onto the front foot.
Soften
Keep your elbows unlocked and your shoulders relaxed; move from the waist, not the arms.
Repeat
Step forward with small, even steps, pressing softly each time.

3b3dc87b-7fcb-4ace-9695-0eb4243733ec.desc: Step one foot to the side and bring the other in smoothly.
how: Prepare
Stand with your feet under your hips, weight even.
Step
Step one foot out to the side, letting your weight glide smoothly across.
Close
Bring the other foot in quietly to meet it, feet together.
Repeat
Continue gliding to the side with small, quiet steps.
